title: BAL recognized by US News & World Report as a top law firm to work for in 2026   | BAL Immigration Law
content:
BAL is proud to share its latest inclusion in U.S. News & World Report’s list of Best Companies to Work For: Law Firms — a data-driven analysis of employee satisfaction at U.S. law firms. Across 2026 metrics, BAL earned high scores in quality of pay, stability and comfort.
“Our people are the drivers of success at BAL,” said Chief People & Culture Officer Nicole Dawson . “We’re proud to care for our employees — whether it’s through flexible schedules, comprehensive health benefits or opportunities to advance in their careers — so they’re confident in the positive difference they make for our clients.”
U.S. News & World Report uses publicly available data on employee sentiment, research providers and editorial teams to determine firm performance across key metrics measuring employee satisfaction in the workplace. These insights help job seekers find a firm that may be the right next step in their careers.
If you’re searching for a workplace that empowers your career and enables you to power human achievement every day, explore immigration careers at BAL.
